race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now Mdn Plate
race.comment: SATURDAYS GIRL (9) has had a few chances but has hit the top four in her past seven starts and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Has placed two of three around this circuit and this is not an overly strong affair. Can finally break through against this lot. ICONIFY (2) will be rock-hard fit now fourth run back from the break and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Can make his presence felt. CANYA BERICH (8) will strip fitter second-up from the spell and has been well in the betting in both career outings to date. Keep very safe. TASSORATI (11) is next best with the reliable Gollan/Lang combination.
